title: Genie 8000lb Telehandler
description:
- Enclosed Cab w/ Heat 
- Solid Tires
- 5900  Hour’s (Most Of Them Are Idle Hour’s)
- 4WD
- 8,000 lbs Maximum Lift Capacity
- Auxiliary Hydraulic
- 43’ 10” Maximum Lift Height
- 28’ 2”  Maximum Forward Reach
- Three Steering Modes (2 Wheel, Round, Crab)
- Hydraulic Frame Leveling
- Forks 

Very  clean and well maintained Unit.
